newsSinceJun6: May 2026 consolidated revenue hit a 2026 high (announced ~Jun 5), with server and optical-module shipments up ~2.5x YoY; AI-related applications now approach ~70% of revenue mix per company commentary. On Jun 9 a Zhen Ding unit disclosed an NT$1.05B machinery/equipment acquisition - an incremental capacity-expansion signal within the previously announced ~NT$100B two-year capex plan (Huai'an + Thailand, ten facilities). Today's +6.45% move to TWD 545 looks like momentum continuation of the AI-PCB rally on top of the already-public May revenue beat rather than a discrete new fundamental catalyst; the equipment purchase is small relative to the stated capex program.

sources.label: DigiTimes - Zhen Ding posts strongest May revenue as server optical module shipments surge
TradingView/Reuters - Zhen Ding unit acquires machinery equipment for NT$1.05B (Jun 9)
DigiTimes - Zhen Ding sees AI products near 70% of revenue, sets NT$100B capex for 2 years

verdicts.rankRationale: On a residual-alpha lens, another +6.45% pop to +287.9% YTD on already-public May revenue news and a minor NT$1.05B equipment buy is rerating chase, not new mispricing; the crowding penalty yesterday's verdict flagged got worse, not better.
verdicts.bull: Record May revenue with server/optical shipments up ~2.5x YoY and AI nearing ~70% of mix confirms Zhen Ding is converting its NT$100B capex into real AI-server/CPO content; the bottleneck thesis is fundamentally on track.
verdicts.neutral: Fundamentals and price are rising together: the AI pivot is real but fully narrated by sell-side and media, so the name earns its 'Monitor / benchmark' bucket - hold exposure elsewhere and use it as a read-through for less-rerated PCB peers.
verdicts.bear: At ~$17.5B cap and +288% YTD, the stock now prices flawless capex execution in Huai'an/Thailand; any AI-server order digestion, iPhone FPC softness, or PCB pricing normalization triggers a sharp de-rating with no valuation cushion left.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: June/Q2 monthly revenue prints showing continued 2x+ YoY growth in server, optical-module, and IC-substrate lines, plus first output from the new Thailand/Huai'an facilities.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowded AI-PCB trade unwinds: momentum/flow reversal after a 4x YTD run, or capex-heavy expansion meeting an AI-server order air pocket, compresses both multiple and estimates simultaneously.
